name: cross_consult_respond
description: Respond to a cross-consultation request. Only callable by the architect. Delivers a binding architectural opinion to the requesting agent.

consultation_id.description: The consultation_id returned when the request was submitted

answer.description: Direct, reasoned architectural opinion. Reference specific files, patterns, or prior decisions where relevant.

references.description: Specific files or patterns in the codebase that support this answer

plan_amendment_required.description: Set to true if the answer reveals a flaw that requires the implementor to submit a plan amendment before proceeding
